ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-26-2010 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAR-19-2010 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-08-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
